title: botrychium × longistitatum
intro: Botrychium × longistitatum, also known as the intermediate fern or long-stalked grape fern, is a rare and unique plant species that is a natural hybrid of two species of the genus Botrychium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Botrychium × longistitatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the fronds and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
